name: Superintendencia Nacional de Fiscalización Laboral
message: [AI generated] The "Superintendencia Nacional de Fiscalización Laboral" (SUNAFIL) is a Peruvian government agency responsible for promoting, supervising and enforcing labor rights. They assure compliance with labor and occupational health and safety standards. They also promote culture of formal employment through the provision of information to workers and employers, aiming to improve working conditions in Peru.
